text: Choose the legal vehicle and financing instrument for an August commitment
description: Resolve whether funding is accepted by an existing/new UG, a pre-incorporation commitment, or another lawful structure. For equity-like money, use a German startup lawyer/notary-approved standard instrument (for example a convertible loan or suitable participation instrument); do not improvise legal terms. Check effects on IP ownership, Robin's role, planned Prototype Fund eligibility (companies cannot receive it), taxes, and future grants before signing.

status.comment: Founder decision plus qualified German legal/tax advice required. This is the gating path for investment.
